## Change type

- [ ] feat — new feature (→ MINOR bump)
- [ ] fix — bug fix (→ PATCH bump)
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] chore — tooling / config / CI
- [ ] docs — documentation
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] breaking change (add `!` after type in title → MAJOR bump)

## What changed

<!-- Bulleted list, grouped logically. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem this solves, the non-obvious choices, the tradeoffs considered. -->

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] `pnpm vitest run --coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm format:check`

Unverifiable: <!-- e.g. UI behaviour, integration, performance — call it out. -->

## Bundled cleanups

<!-- List any refactors/cleanups outside the primary intent, what files they touched, and why. -->

Refs: <!-- e.g. SC-1234 -->
